race.comment: HELL (5) did some early work to find the lead but was entitled to do a bit more as $1.85 favourite last start over 1200m at Doomben. Draws ideally again to take up the running. Has an outstanding record at this trip and will give them something to catch. BRERETON (10) settled just off the speed then let down nicely but missed narrowly last time out in an open sprint over 1100m at Ipswich. Looking for six furlongs now. Last carried today's weight of 52kgs here in July and finished second. Good each-way option. BATTLEFIELD (3) came from next to last to record a decisive win over 1400m here four weeks ago. Drops 3kgs after the claim and won't mind coming back to 1200m. Serious contender. VODKA MARTINI (4) couldn't quite go with them in the concluding stages of a 1000m open handicap here a fortnight ago. More at home over 1200m now so watch for a better run. POCKET FULL (9) has been very good at his last couple. Must be respected out of gate one with only 52.5kgs.
